steps.title: Use the resemblance clue
steps.content: Forrest admired Faulkner and wrote a tribute passage in which people familiar with Faulkner would "see the resemblance." The blank needs a noun for something that copies or reproduces another writer's style.

steps.title: Choose the copying noun
steps.content: A means forgetting, which conflicts with tribute. B means rejecting, also conflicting with admiration. D means belief or judgment and does not describe what the passage is. The needed noun means a copy or reproduction of Faulkner's style. The answer is C.
